purpose: Machine-readable dispatch contract for process-qa. Terminal verification skill — no mandatory downstream dispatches. Hooks read this as fallback ground truth when transcript classification is missing or truncated (H11 audit finding 2026-04-18).
notes: QA is terminal — it executes tools (Bash/Read/MCP) directly to verify claims and emits a QA REPORT block. QA does NOT fix failures (reports them back to originating skill). Invoking other process skills or agents from within process-qa is off-contract; failures escalate to the user.
